positive: A highly detailed, symmetrical abstract celestial botanical pattern, featuring glowing, stylized constellations intertwined with intricate, bioluminescent flora and crystalline structures. The composition is central and balanced, ideal for repeating apparel print. Style should be a fusion of neo-Art Nouveau and modern psychedelic graphic design. Use deep indigo, midnight violet, iridescent teal, and vibrant gold leaf accents against a muted cosmic background. Focus on strong outlines, clean silhouettes, and high-contrast layering. Studio lighting setup, vector-art rendering, 8K ultra-detail.
negative: blur, noise, grain, artifact, text, watermark, logo, signature, extra limbs, bad anatomy, jpeg artifacts, low resolution, cropped, out of frame
